description: Registry of named closure-gate checks a deliverable's proof_requirements.gates can reference by id. DELIVERABLES-14. The closure engine (DELIVERABLES-15) executes what deliverable_gates.resolve_gates() returns; this file only maps ids to check definitions.

script.runs: an external command; passes when it exits 0

fields.command: list[str], required, argv run from the repo root
fields.cwd: str, optional working directory relative to the repo root
fields.env_allowlist: list[str], optional env var names/globs passed through

pytest.runs: python3 -m pytest <target> <args>; passes on a clean pytest exit

fields.target: str, required test path or node id

store_check.runs: a named pure-store assertion resolved by the closure engine

offline_evidence.runs: asserts a task carries terminal offline provenance (no command)

fields.task_id: str, required task the evidence must exist on
fields.task_project: str, optional owning project (defaults to the deliverable's project)

scope.runs: reserved built-in Gate 1 (scope complete); never declared in this manifest, referenced as {"id": "scope"}

gates.title: Concurrent agent-path SLO gate
gates.description: HARDEN-50/64 production-shaped 8-agent concurrent MCP load gate against the committed perf/concurrent_load_slo.json ratchet.

gates.title: Concurrent-load SLO ratchet test
gates.description: Asserts the committed SLO ratchet baseline is tighten-only and internally consistent (HARDEN-64).

gates.title: MCP observability test
gates.description: Asserts the MCP observability surface exposes per-tool lock-wait counts and write-path latency (HARDEN-63).

gates.title: Deliverable closure gate test
gates.description: End-to-end closure-gate test: fixture deliverable, scope pass/fail, grade persistence. Target file is created by DELIVERABLES-21.
